case_title: CHRISTOPHER CRAIG et al VS. PAUL TUEN WONG et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-17-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-10-2007 VACATED. (MLF)

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-21-2007 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 604. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR DEC-10-2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-15-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER CRAIG AND MEGAN CRAIG'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENSES 7, 8, 9, 21 AND 22. THESE ARE ELEMENTS OF PLAINTIFF'S CASE, NOT AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE AS TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294, THERE IS NO BASIS FOR THIS DEFENSE (23); AND AS TO DEFENSES 17 AND 24, A MOTION TO STRIKE IS THE WAY TO CHALLENGE THESE DEFENSES. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2, 3, 5, 6, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 18, 19, 20, 25 AND 26 TO ALLEGE FACTS THAT PROVIDE A BASIS FOR THE DEFENSES ALLEGED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
